_meta.title: Module 2 past-paper practice
_meta.note: No new spec points scheduled. Days 1-6 produced NO committed content (content/ empty, state.json metrics all 0). Per user decision (full days 1-6 backfill first), today builds notes + question banks for all 12 days 1-6 spec points, QAs them, then assembles the Module-2 mock.
_meta.reconciliation: currentDay computed from START_DATE 2026-06-16 + today 2026-06-22 = Day 7; matches state.json.
_meta.importNote: imports/localStorage-export.json absent; proceeding on schedule order with no student-progress adjustments. All 12 backfill spec points are HIGH frequency.

tasks.notes: A-level precise, OCR A H032, mark-scheme language. Mole/formula/concentration topics (2.1.3a/b/c) need a workedExample with full units + correct sig figs.
Titration calc (2.1.4b) workedExample with units; oxidation-number rules (2.1.5a); balanced half-equations (2.1.5b); s/p/d configs to Z=36 including ions (2.2.1b).
5+ trios (15+ Q) per spec id. Original only. Nothing over 3 marks. Calcs carry units in the question and require units in the answer. Answerable from the single spec point alone.
5+ trios (15+ Q) per spec id. Original only. Nothing over 3 marks. Titration sums carry full units; redox half-equations balanced for atoms + charge.

Open every content/notes/{id}.json and content/questions/{id}.json. Check schema validity, A-level precision, OCR command words, difficulty ladder (nothing >3 marks), answerability, units on calcs, and no past-paper copying. Write {specId}.json verdict per id. Only pass/pass ids count toward metrics; fail items list fixes for the producing agent.

Assemble a Module-2 review mock from the QA'd banks: Moles (2.1.3a/b/c), Redox (2.1.5a/b), Electron Structure (2.2.1a/b) ONLY (per schedule; titrations excluded). Mirror OCR Paper 1 shape: 1-mark recall section then 2/3-mark structured, weighted to HIGH-frequency points, ~1 min/mark, round total. Original questions only. Assemble + make ready to sit; live marking + weakTopics are recorded on 'Complete Day 7'.

After validator + mock-runner report: refresh metrics (notesGenerated, questionBanksGenerated from pass/pass ids), write weakTopics for any mock topic <70%, rebuild dashboard.md, commit on 'Complete Day 7'.
